title: Babies Galore
description: Adds tons of new baby mob variants, one for almost every mob, no resource pack required!
body:
![Babies Galore](https://i.postimg.cc/SKXMWXZK/minecraft-title.png)
Have you ever looked at a mob and thought, “Why doesn’t that have a baby version?”
Well, with Babies Galore, now it does! 🎉

This data pack turns almost every vanilla mob that doesn’t already have a baby variant into one that can — no resource pack needed!
From Creepers to Witches, Guardians to Phantoms (and even hidden mobs like Illusioners and Giants) — if it’s not supposed to have a baby… now it does!

![Spider and Creeper](https://i.postimg.cc/1X4htQRf/2025-11-05-18-31-03.png)

✨ Features
- Adds baby versions for nearly every vanilla mob that lacks one!
- Each mob has a 1 in 20 chance to spawn as a baby.
- Babies are half the size of their adult counterparts.
- They move with a 30% speed boost — just like baby zombies!
- Works seamlessly in survival and multiplayer worlds.
- No resource pack required — all pure vanilla mechanics.

🧩 Compatibility & Customisation

Don’t see a mob you expected? Or want to add your own modded mobs?
No worries — it’s fully customisable! You can easily add your own mobs by editing one simple file.

<details> <summary>How to add your own baby mobs</summary>

1. Extract it and open:
data/babies_galore/tags/entity_type/

2. Open babies.json.

3. On the last line (currently "minecraft:wither_skeleton"), add a comma and a new line.

4. Add your new mob in quotes — formatted as namespace:mob_id (e.g. betternether:hydrogen_jellyfish).

5. Repeat for as many mobs as you like — just remember commas between entries!

6. Save the file and reload your world.
Done! 🎈

</details>
🐛 Found a bug? Missing a mob?

Let me know!
You can report issues or suggest additions directly on [GitHub](https://github.com/sniffercraft34/Babies-Galore).
